# clawvisor_spend_cap (Resource)

A per-window spend cap. One cap per window; import with id equal to the window (`daily` or `monthly`). Requires the `local_governance` capability (spec 06a) on OSS.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A per-window spend cap. One cap per window (daily/monthly).
# Requires the local_governance capability (spec 06a) on OSS.
resource "clawvisor_spend_cap" "daily" {
  window      = "daily"
  cap_micros  = 5000000 # $5.00
  enforcement = "soft"  # warn at 80%/100%; "hard" blocks at 100%
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cap_micros` (Number) Cap in micros (1e-6 USD). Must be positive.
- `window` (String) `daily` or `monthly`. Changing it forces replacement.

### Optional

- `enforcement` (String) `soft` (warn at 80%/100%) or `hard` (block at 100%). Defaults to `soft`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Equal to `window`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import id is the window ("daily" or "monthly").
terraform import clawvisor_spend_cap.daily daily
```
